name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-80
title: refresh.py inline policy section detection no longer matches after generate-claude-md.py removed inline markers
description: hooks/refresh.py lines 62-82: detects 'rabbit-policy-start ... rabbit-policy-end' inline section and prefers that over @-imports. But generate-claude-md.py (current implementation, line 58-64) produces a CLAUDE.md with ONLY @-imports — no inline markers. The inline_re branch is therefore dead code in current usage. Either: (a) remove the inline-section detection path from refresh.py since the inline format is retired, or (b) restore inline policy emission in generate-claude-md.py if the inline form was a feature, not a relic.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
